game_name: Ninja Gaiden III: The Ancient Ship of Doom

special_mechanics.name: Wall Climb & Spring
special_mechanics.description: Ryu can climb up and down walls. Pressing jump button while holding control pad away from wall causes spring-off effect for directional momentum

special_mechanics.name: Overhead Hang
special_mechanics.description: Ability to hang overhead from pipes or ivy; can swing up on top or drop from them

special_mechanics.name: Wall Attack
special_mechanics.description: Can attack enemies with secondary weapons while on wall

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source documents gameplay mechanics qualitatively but provides no numerical physics parameters, sub-pixel precision data, or frame-based values.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ninja Gaiden III: The Ancient Ship of Doom
